name: yamlet-skills
description: Spec-driven development with yamlet: an interviewing author drills you down to minimal, testable `.yamlet.yaml` specs with EARS acceptance criteria, appending through the `yamlet` CLI so the file is correct by construction (the CLI owns all serialization and IDs). Two adversarial challengers guard the immutable init/commit gates, and a verifier closes the loop. Requires the `yamlet` CLI on PATH.
